description: Pre-clinical drug discovery intelligence — targets, compounds, patents, trials, whitespace
name: io.github.sourabhnk/mosaic-mcp

environmentVariables.description: PostgreSQL/Neon connection string for the Mosaic knowledge graph (must end /mosaic_db)
environmentVariables.name: DATABASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: API key that unlocks the 28 Pro tools (optional; free tier works without it)
environmentVariables.name: MOSAIC_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Override tier for local dev: free (default), pro, or enterprise
environmentVariables.name: MOSAIC_TIER

title: Mosaic Pre-Clinical Intelligence
